In [1]:
import cv2
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
In [2]:
path = "../../img/image-processing/fruits_1.jpg"
In [3]:
img_bgr = cv2.imread(path, cv2.IMREAD_COLOR)
img_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(img_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)
img_gray = cv2.cvtColor(img_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
plt.imshow(img_rgb)
plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()

Sharpening¶

In [4]:
laplacian = np.array([[1, 1, 1], [1, -8, 1], [1, 1, 1]])
img_laplacian = cv2.filter2D(img_rgb, -1, laplacian)
plt.imshow(img_laplacian)
plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()
In [5]:
plt.imshow(np.abs(img_rgb - img_laplacian))
plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()

Unsharp Masking¶

In [6]:
alpha = 10
blur = np.array([[1, 1, 1], [1, 1, 1], [1, 1, 1]]) / 9
ori = np.array([[0, 0, 0], [0, 1, 0], [0, 0, 0]])
filter = (1+alpha) * ori - alpha * blur
img_filter = cv2.filter2D(img_rgb, -1, filter)
plt.imshow(img_filter)
plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()
In [7]:
gasussian_filter = cv2.getGaussianKernel(3, .5)
gasussian_filter = gasussian_filter * gasussian_filter.T
filter = (1+alpha) * ori - alpha * gasussian_filter
img_filter = cv2.filter2D(img_rgb, -1, filter)
plt.imshow(img_filter)
plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()

Edge Detection¶

In [8]:
sobelx = np.array([[-1, 0, 1], [-2, 0, 2], [-1, 0, 1]])
sobely = np.array([[-1, -2, -1], [0, 0, 0], [1, 2, 1]])
img_sobelx = cv2.filter2D(img_rgb, -1, sobelx)
img_sobely = cv2.filter2D(img_rgb, -1, sobely)
img_gradient = np.abs(img_sobelx) + np.abs(img_sobely)
plt.imshow(img_gradient)
plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()

Segmentation¶

In [9]:
m = np.array([255,99,71])
plt.imshow(np.reshape(m, (1, 1, 3)))
plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()
In [10]:
img = img_rgb-m
d = np.sqrt(np.sum(img*img,axis=-1))
d = np.where(d>40)
img = img_gray.copy()
img[d] = 255
plt.imshow(img, cmap='gray')
plt.xticks([]), plt.yticks([])
plt.show()
